findings.title: Sanitize dangerouslySetInnerHTML SVG rendering
findings.what: Add DOMPurify sanitization before rendering AI-generated SVG via dangerouslySetInnerHTML. Install dompurify and wrap all innerHTML assignments.
findings.why: XSS vulnerability - AI-generated SVG content is rendered without sanitization, allowing potential script injection in user browsers.

findings.title: Remove dead backend files and duplicate requirements
findings.what: Delete 4 unused Python files (mutations_full.py, queries_broken.py, simple_main.py, test_argon2.py) and 2 duplicate requirements files. Keep only requirements.txt as canonical.
findings.why: Dead code creates confusion about which files are authoritative and increases cognitive load for contributors.

findings.title: Add security headers and image optimization to next.config.ts
findings.what: Add poweredByHeader: false, security headers (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options), and remotePatterns for backend/YouTube image domains to the currently empty Next.js config.
findings.why: Missing security headers in frontend responses and unoptimized remote images. Backend has these via nginx but frontend on Vercel does not.

findings.title: Replace bare except and print() with proper logging
findings.what: Fix bare `except:` on main.py:83 to `except Exception:`. Replace all print() calls across backend with Python logging module. Add structured log format with timestamps.
findings.why: Bare except catches SystemExit/KeyboardInterrupt preventing clean shutdown. print() statements provide no log levels, timestamps, or filtering in production Docker logs.

findings.title: Add backend input validation for auth and chat
findings.what: Add Pydantic validators: min password length (8), email format validation, message content max_length, project name length limits, and base64 image_data size cap (10MB).
findings.why: Frontend validates password at 6 chars but backend accepts any length. No size limits on chat messages or image uploads enables DoS. Email format not validated server-side.

findings.title: Add React Error Boundary for graceful failure
findings.what: Create an ErrorBoundary component wrapping ChatInterface, PatternLibrary, and ProjectDetailPage. Show a user-friendly fallback UI with retry button instead of white screen on component errors.
findings.why: Any unhandled React error crashes the entire app with a blank screen. Error boundaries contain failures to individual sections and allow recovery.

findings.title: Add rate limiting to GraphQL endpoint
findings.what: Install slowapi and add rate limiting middleware: 100 req/min for authenticated users, 20 req/min for anonymous. Apply specifically to the /crooked-finger/graphql POST endpoint.
findings.why: No rate limiting means the AI chat endpoint (which calls external APIs with quotas) can be abused. YouTube service has 100/month RapidAPI limit with no per-user enforcement.
